display-face.$value: large crisp humanist serif or warm grotesk title typography with restrained tracking

utility-face.$value: clean neutral sans serif for small labels, precise and highly legible

flag-editorial.$value: premium public-benefit AI campaign poster, one modern woven fabric flag as the hero object, clear editorial hierarchy, tactile paper and desk-light realism, quiet confidence, spacious composition

thinking-space.$value: visual cues of serious thinking: paper margins, soft gridlines, pencil notes, simple reasoning diagrams, controlled negative space, no generic glowing AI sphere

global-exclude.$value: garbled text, unreadable typography, malformed Claude word, fake official seals, fake sponsor logos, watermark, cheap e-commerce flyer, cluttered interface, glossy robot mascot, crowded composition

campaign.name: claude-flag-launch
campaign.brief: 为 Anthropic 的 Claude 制作一张中文社媒宣发图，表达 Claude 是帮助用户处理复杂问题的思考伙伴。画面核心是旗帜意象；这是非官方 campaign concept，不要伪装成官方公告。

content.headline: Claude
content.subject: 一面写有 Claude 的现代织物旗帜在清澈晨光中展开，旗帜周围是纸张、工作台、细线图形和理性思考的视觉线索。画面可以加入清晰小字："把复杂问题，交给清晰思考" 和 "The AI for problem solvers"。

positioning.audience: builders, analysts, researchers, operators, and teams solving complex work
notes: Claude is positioned around thinking, problem solving, and reliable collaboration.

elements.description: AI research and products that foreground safety, usefulness, and long-term benefit.
Claude as a tool for deep work, structured thinking, and complex problem solving.

accepted.description: Claude should feel useful for people working through difficult, high-context problems.
The campaign should feel calm, clear, and intentionally uncluttered.

positioning.promise: A thinking partner for people solving complex work.
positioning.usage_note: Unofficial campaign concept; do not imply a formal Anthropic announcement.

elements.description: A single textile flag used as a memorable launch symbol for thought and direction.
Paper, notes, diagrams, and desk-light details that imply serious thinking.

accepted.description: Avoid fake certification marks, fake press badges, or misleading official notices.
The Claude word should be large, simple, and readable.

resolved_style.name: flag-launch
resolved_style.prompt: premium public-benefit AI campaign poster, one modern woven fabric flag as the hero object, clear editorial hierarchy, tactile paper and desk-light realism, quiet confidence, spacious composition, visual cues of serious thinking: paper margins, soft gridlines, pencil notes, simple reasoning diagrams, controlled negative space, no generic glowing AI sphere
resolved_style.typography: large crisp humanist serif or warm grotesk title typography with restrained tracking; clean neutral sans serif for small labels, precise and highly legible
resolved_style.negative: garbled text, unreadable typography, malformed Claude word, fake official seals, fake sponsor logos, watermark, cheap e-commerce flyer, cluttered interface, glossy robot mascot, crowded composition

assets.prompt:
Brand style: premium public-benefit AI campaign poster, one modern woven fabric flag as the hero object, clear editorial hierarchy, tactile paper and desk-light realism, quiet confidence, spacious composition, visual cues of serious thinking: paper margins, soft gridlines, pencil notes, simple reasoning diagrams, controlled negative space, no generic glowing AI sphere
Campaign brief: 为 Anthropic 的 Claude 制作一张中文社媒宣发图，表达 Claude 是帮助用户处理复杂问题的思考伙伴。画面核心是旗帜意象；这是非官方 campaign concept，不要伪装成官方公告。
Subject: 一面写有 Claude 的现代织物旗帜在清澈晨光中展开，旗帜周围是纸张、工作台、细线图形和理性思考的视觉线索。画面可以加入清晰小字："把复杂问题，交给清晰思考" 和 "The AI for problem solvers"。
Deliverable: flag-poster, 1024x1536px
Headline text to render exactly: "Claude"
Use only this brand palette unless natural lighting requires subtle neutrals: #191713, #F7F1E8, #D87857, #EBBBAC, #3A342D, #2F6F9F
Typography direction for visible text: large crisp humanist serif or warm grotesk title typography with restrained tracking; clean neutral sans serif for small labels, precise and highly legible
